key_rules.title: Ejari Registration (Dubai)
key_rules.description: All tenancy contracts must be registered with Ejari (RERA/DLD). Unregistered contracts are not legally enforceable and cannot be used for DEWA, visa, or disputes.

key_rules.title: Tawtheeq Registration (Abu Dhabi)
key_rules.description: Mandatory registration of tenancy contracts via Tawtheeq system. Required for legal protection and services.

key_rules.title: Off-plan Project Rules
key_rules.description: Developers must register off-plan projects, use escrow accounts (70% buyer funds protected), provide quarterly updates.
